\providecommand{\Pageref}[1]{\hfill p.\pageref{#1}}
 [**Theorem 1**](LimitCycles.qmd#Theorem-1)\Pageref{Theorem-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](LimitCycles.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Theorem 3**](LimitCycles.qmd#Theorem-3)\Pageref{Theorem-3}

 [**Theorem 4**](LimitCycles.qmd#Theorem-4)\Pageref{Theorem-4}

 [**Corollary 5**](LimitCycles.qmd#Corollary-5)\Pageref{Corollary-5}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}

 [**Definition 1**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Definition-1)\Pageref{Definition-1}

 [**Theorem 2**](2DBifurcations.qmd#Theorem-2)\Pageref{Theorem-2}
